reviews.comment:
Es el ACA.   mucha demora para cargar como en otros ACA. Parece que los playeros trabajan a reglamento

It's the ACA. There are long waits to fill up, just like at other ACAs. It seems the attendants are working by the book.

reviews.comment:
Los baños con llave siempre pesimo el de discapacitados trabado. El kiosco 1 solo enchufe para toda la gente. O sea wifi si pero ni podes conectar. Lo de los baños una vergüenza. Atención playeros buena y de mostrador tmb. Pleno corazón de tandil.

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are always terrible, and the accessible one is locked. The kiosk only has one outlet for everyone. They have Wi-Fi, but you can't even connect. The restrooms are a disgrace. The service from the beach attendants and the counter staff is good. Right in the heart of Tandil.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/8137682330194139512/reviews/ChRDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN1alBFTBAB
